title: Short title
doc_html:
PART II-E. LICENSING OF NURSE STAFFING AGENCIES

§2120.11. Short title

            This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Nurse Staffing Agency Licensing Law".

            Acts 2022, No. 577, §1.
doc_text:
PART II-E.  LICENSING OF NURSE STAFFING AGENCIES
§2120.11.  Short title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Nurse Staffing Agency Licensing
Law".
Acts 2022, No. 577, §1.
